title: create style hopper
description: Adding remodeled hopper look like Createmod things.
body:
![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4690c809f5b1c30b6451eb3435b405c6488705d7.png)
This resourcepack makes Minecraft Hopper look like Createmod style. Requires createmod as a texture dependency.

Redstone indicator not updating in realtime due to vanilla specification.
